notes: rowset marker returns an empty deterministic rowset descriptor document
rowset_new without shape returns an empty descriptor document
rowset_new row_shape route preserves bounded descriptor shape metadata
rowset_append marker appends a row to a returned descriptor without mutating input
rowset_append variadic route encodes appended expressions as one row
rowset_size marker returns int64 row count
rowset_size rowset route returns int64 row count
rowset_to_array marker returns the row array payload as json_document
rowset_to_array rowset route returns the row array payload as json_document
table_value marker returns an empty deterministic table-value descriptor
table_value_new without shape returns an empty descriptor
table_value_new row_shape route preserves bounded descriptor shape metadata
table_value_append marker appends one JSON row to the returned descriptor
table_value_append tv row route appends one JSON row to the returned descriptor
setof generic descriptor includes value and ordinality columns
setof key text value text descriptor encodes one bounded key-value row
setof key text value document descriptor encodes one bounded document row
unnest marker returns the bounded array payload as json_document
unnest array route returns the bounded array payload as json_document
generate_series marker returns a bounded integer JSON sequence
generate_series start stop step route returns a bounded integer JSON sequence
element over a singleton multiset returns the single JSON-backed element
fusion over multiset returns deterministic concatenated array-like JSON
intersection over multiset returns deterministic duplicate-preserving intersection JSON
rowset_append refuses missing rowset input with exact invalid-input diagnostic
generate_series refuses zero step with exact invalid-input diagnostic
unnest refuses scalar non-array JSON input with exact invalid-input diagnostic
